title: Fix multi-line Markdown code block editing and rendering in articles

requirements.text: Ensure Markdown fenced code blocks (triple backticks) render as true multi-line code blocks (preserve newlines and indentation) in both the Article reader page and the Editor preview, and are not collapsed into a single line.

quotes: 帮我看看写文章时候我用到的代码块那地方，没办法代码块整个代码，只能一行，显示后看着很不舒服

acceptanceCriteria: Given an article containing a fenced code block with multiple lines, the ArticleReader page displays it over multiple lines with preserved indentation.
Given the same content in the editor, MarkdownPreview displays the code block over multiple lines with preserved indentation.
Long lines inside code blocks do not break the layout (either horizontal scroll works or wrapping is applied consistently), and line breaks are never removed.

requirements.text: Improve the article writing experience so users can insert a multi-line fenced code block from the editor toolbar (in addition to inline code), without having to manually type triple backticks.

quotes: 没办法代码块整个代码，只能一行

acceptanceCriteria: The editor toolbar includes a dedicated action to insert a fenced code block template using triple backticks, placing the cursor inside the block after insertion.
The existing inline code action remains available and unchanged in behavior.

requirements.text: Harden Markdown code block parsing so fenced code blocks are recognized reliably (including Windows newlines and optional language specifiers like ```js) and still render correctly even if the final closing backticks are missing (fail gracefully).
acceptanceCriteria: Content with CRLF (\r\n) newlines renders fenced code blocks correctly.
A fence like ```language is treated as a code block start and does not appear in the output.
If the content ends while still inside a code block, the preview/reader still renders the collected code content in a code block rather than collapsing it into normal text.

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or anything in frontend/src/components/ui (compose instead).
Keep all changes within the existing React + TypeScript + Tailwind stack; do not introduce new frameworks or external services.
nonGoals: Add syntax highlighting, language detection, or a full CommonMark-compliant Markdown engine.
Backend schema or stored article content migrations.
